# Description

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New detection rule / improved classifier
- [ ] Security fix (please email security@ before opening — see SECURITY.md)

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No new outbound network calls (or reviewer approval)
- [ ] No bundled model weights
- [ ] License-compatible deps (see DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md)
- [ ] If this touches redaction/encryption/classifier: I've read the safety-sensitive review notes in CONTRIBUTING.md

## Related issue
Closes #
